languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн вздымает палец.{/n} "Именно. У человека всегда есть выбор, из чего формировать себя — сожалений о допущенных ошибках или опыта, что он из них извлек. Истинной мудрости способны достичь лишь те, кто выбирает второе".

{n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн вздымает палец.{/n} "Именно. У человека всегда есть выбор, из чего формировать себя — сожалений о допущенных ошибках или опыта, что он из них извлек. Истинной мудрости способны достичь лишь те, кто выбирает второе".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

{n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

{n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは指を立てて言った。{/n}「まさにその通りだ。人は自分の過去を後悔するか、その経験から得たものを選ぶ。後者の道を選ぶ者だけが真の知恵を得ることができるのだ」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

traits.locale_text: エオグンは指を立てて言った。「まさにその通りだ。人は自分の過去を後悔するか、その経験から得たものを選ぶ。後者の道を選ぶ者だけが真の知恵を得ることができるのだ。」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡举起一根手指。{/n}“完全正确。人要自己选择用什么构筑自我——是对过往错误的悔恨，还是从错误中汲取的经验。只有选择后者，才能触及真正的智慧。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡举起一根手指。{/n}“完全正确。人要自己选择用什么构筑自我——是对过往错误的悔恨，还是从错误中汲取的经验。只有选择后者，才能触及真正的智慧。”

languages.text: « Exactement, {n}répond Eogunn en levant un doigt.{/n} C'est à nous de décider ce qui nous façonne : les regrets de nos erreurs passées ou l'expérience que nous en avons tirée. Seuls ceux qui choisissent la deuxième voie peuvent atteindre la véritable sagesse. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

traits.locale_text: « Exactement, {n}répond Eogunn en levant un doigt.{/n} C'est à nous de décider ce qui nous façonne : les regrets de nos erreurs passées ou l'expérience que nous en avons tirée. Seuls ceux qui choisissent la deuxième voie peuvent atteindre la véritable sagesse. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo.{/n} «Exacto. Los hombres eligen qué los conforma: el arrepentimiento por sus errores pasados o la experiencia obtenida de ellos. Solo quienes optan por la segunda opción pueden alcanzar la auténtica sabiduría».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo.{/n} «Exacto. Los hombres eligen qué los conforma: el arrepentimiento por sus errores pasados o la experiencia obtenida de ellos. Solo quienes optan por la segunda opción pueden alcanzar la auténtica sabiduría».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn bir parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Kesinlikle. İnsan, neyden oluştuğunu kendi seçer. Geçmişteki hatalarının pişmanlıkları da olabilir, onlardan kazandığı deneyim de. Sadece ikinci yolu seçenler gerçek bilgeliğe ulaşabilir."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn bir parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Kesinlikle. İnsan, neyden oluştuğunu kendi seçer. Geçmişteki hatalarının pişmanlıkları da olabilir, onlardan kazandığı deneyim de. Sadece ikinci yolu seçenler gerçek bilgeliğe ulaşabilir."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hebt einen Finger.{/n} "Genau. Ein Mann wählt, woraus er besteht ... aus Reue für seine vergangenen Fehler oder aus der aus ihnen gewonnenen Erfahrung. Nur wer Letzteres wählt, kann wahre Weisheit erlangen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger.{/n} "Precisely. A man chooses what he is made of — regrets for his past mistakes, or the experience he gained from them. Only those who choose the latter course can attain true wisdom."
